changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Restrict MANAGER_BOUTIQUE to its operational scope: drop SETTINGS_READ and AUDIT_READ, reserved to ADMINISTRATEUR/MANAGER_ADM. MANAGER_BOUTIQUE keeps payment-mode read access via SALES_READ/ROYALTY_READ (canReadPaymentSettings).
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM rel_profil_metier__permissions relation USING profil_metier profil, permission_metier permission WHERE relation.profil_metier_id = profil.id AND relation.permissions_id = permission.id AND profil.code = 'MANAGER_BOUTIQUE' AND permission.code IN ('SETTINGS_READ', 'AUDIT_READ');
